{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230454102BE6B55EA8935C9DD4B7"}"},"total":94},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7616832341652636440","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"目前来说，还不错，是个老手，文笔好。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773440685,"group_id":"7603722515835259966","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"书中忙里偷闲，书中解心里学。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwIn6ZbLgsTNV2Rz1F/psTPQRybXut/JjezuyqP4UmRW","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790605&x-signature=YlzhmTSXCiJ8jjqgO%2BoHwuKOIgo%3D","user_id":"2339409404385581","user_name":"南海中频电"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2339409404385581","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7603722515835259966","book_info":{"abstract":"【都市+系统+武道+不压战力+颜狗+古武+易筋经】

“去438号秘境挖矿三十年，或者接受联邦强制婚配，你选哪个？”
穿越到高武世界的林凡，开局就面临地狱级二选一。
身为医学博士的他，明明打出了880公斤的蜕凡八重战力，却因灵魂排斥被测出“黄级下品”废材天赋，惨遭退档。
为了不去秘境当炮灰，林凡含泪选择了相亲，结果相亲当天画风突变，在一堆大白菜和土豆里头，突然掺和进来一颗极品翡翠白菜，他被大陆豪门欧阳世家的长女欧阳雨宁看中，相亲当天闪婚。
由此，天元界画风最清奇的“软饭王”诞生了！
别人眼中的林凡：吃软饭的废材赘婿，躲在女人身后的弱鸡。
实际上的林凡：“不好意思，吃软饭也是门技术活。你想吃还吃不上呢！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0279752fd5f5bbbcb9914c40885f2f66","author":"天降神话","author_id":"","book_id":"7603722515835259966","book_name":"高武：软饭硬吃，开局领个老婆","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302838","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"17.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":26,"name":"神医","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=26&name=神医&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7603722521258492478","read_count":"171344","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"410379"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.8","serial_count":"195","tags":"都市高武,都市,系统,神医,穿越,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c44ec5c35bf249ffd588f8d42c3920d0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779396850&x-signature=8TL4%2BCRj5f33ddwN%2BXqQ4nrcLTY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2610718830764059","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"35"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230454102BE6B55EA8935C9DD4B7"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_coun
